104337773.summary: A curated directory of Chinese independent developers' projects, organized by category (programmer tools, games, websites/apps) with submission guidelines and project status tracking.
104337773.rationale: This is a general-purpose catalog of indie projects. While the excerpt mentions some AI-related entries (e.g., 'Agent Island', 'claude-i18n', AI trading bots, AI content tools), the collection itself is organized around indie developer projects generally, not around AI. The stated submission criteria require projects to be websites or apps, with no AI-specific focus. A general catalog does not qua

793375104.summary: A curated repository of 100+ open-source AI agents, RAG applications, and agent skills designed to be cloned, customized, and deployed, supporting multiple LLM models including Claude, Gemini, GPT, and others.
793375104.rationale: This collection is explicitly organized around AI as its primary subject. It contains AI agents, agent skills, RAG apps, and multi-agent systems across starter and advanced categories. The collection is fundamentally an AI resource directory, making it materially AI-related.

1148788086.summary: A collection of reusable skills for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, and others) designed to improve agent performance in real engineering workflows, covering grilling sessions, test-driven development, documentation, and debugging.
1148788086.rationale: This is an explicitly AI-focused collection of agent skills. The primary purpose is to enhance AI coding agent capabilities through composable, reusable modules. It directly addresses AI agent performance and workflow optimization.

1130004860.summary: A high-performance safety hook that intercepts and blocks destructive shell and git commands before execution, specifically designed to protect users from accidental data loss caused by AI coding agents.
1130004860.rationale: This tool is purpose-built to address a specific AI agent problem: preventing catastrophic mistakes from coding agents. While it is a developer tool, its core organizing subject and raison d'être is protecting users from AI agent failures, making it materially AI-related.

1006414368.summary: A free, open-source video editor for web, desktop, and mobile platforms, currently undergoing a ground-up rewrite with planned features including an Editor API, third-party plugins, and headless automation mode.
1006414368.rationale: OpenCut is a video editing application. While the planned rewrite mentions future MCP server support for AI agents and headless mode, these are not material to its primary product today. The planned AI integration does not qualify an otherwise non-AI product as AI-related.
